Description: Render scrollable table with fixed row-number column and column-letter headers (A/B/C...). Frozen corner cell. Empty-state hint in status bar.
Pure TypeScript parser: configurable delimiter (comma/pipe/space), RFC 4180 quoted fields, escaped quotes, blank lines. Returns { rows, errors }.
Modal overlay with drag-and-drop zone (.csv only), native file input, paste textarea (Ctrl+V), and parse-error list with line numbers.
First row as header toggle. Row 1 renders as sticky thead with teal highlight. Column-letter labels replaced by actual header text.
Sort icon in each column header cycling none->asc->desc->none. Auto-detects numeric vs text. Shows sort state in status bar.
Funnel icon opens dropdown: checkbox list of unique values (searchable when >=5 items) or operator+value for numeric columns. Active filters shown in status bar.
Mouse-down sets anchor; drag extends selection; mouse-up finalises. Column-letter header selects whole column. Row-number gutter selects whole row. Selection highlighted blue.
When 2+ numeric cells selected show Sum/Avg/Min/Max in status bar. Hides when no numeric cells are selected.
Double-click or Enter enters edit mode. Textarea pre-filled with value. Shift+Enter adds newline; Enter commits and moves down; Tab commits and moves right; Escape discards. Cell auto-grows height.
Hover over row-number gutter shows + (insert above) and x (delete) as absolutely positioned overlays. Updates data array in place.
Hover over column-letter header shows + (insert left) and x (delete) overlay buttons. Same pattern as Task 8.1.
Modal with filename input; Full CSV vs Selected range radio; Cancel and Download buttons. Serialises data to CSV with active delimiter and triggers browser download.
Top toolbar: Download button; Clear All button; Delimiter dropdown (Comma/Pipe/Space); First-row-as-header checkbox. Replaces ad-hoc buttons in CsvViewer.
Auto-save raw CSV string plus delimiter/header/sort/filter state to localStorage on every change. Restore all state on page load. Show autosave hint in status bar.
